stories.title: Trump Criticizes $1,000 World Cup Ticket Prices
stories.desc: President Trump said he wouldn't pay $1,000 for World Cup tickets amid criticism of FIFA's pricing, though FIFA defended costs as aligned with major US sporting events.

stories.title: Shakira Unveils World Cup 2026 Anthem 'Dai Dai'
stories.desc: Shakira released a teaser for her FIFA World Cup 2026 anthem called 'Dai Dai' (Go Go), set to release May 14, making her the first Latin American singer to compose 4 official WC anthems.

stories.title: FIFA Triples World Cup Final Ticket Price to $33K
stories.desc: FIFA has increased the best available World Cup final ticket to $33,000, tripling the previous pricing tier as part of controversial ticketing strategy.

stories.title: Panini to Lose FIFA Rights After 2030
stories.desc: After 50 years, Panini will lose FIFA World Cup sticker rights to Fanatics from 2031 onwards. The 2026 and 2030 albums will be Panini's final editions.

stories.title: Coca-Cola x Panini Exclusive Stickers Launch
stories.desc: 12 exclusive Coca-Cola x Panini stickers featuring stars like Harry Kane and Lamine Yamal are hidden in specially marked 20-oz bottles, marking first time this promotion comes to North America.

stories.title: Panini 2026 Album Features 980 Stickers
stories.desc: The largest Panini World Cup album ever launched April 28 with 980 stickers across 112 pages, featuring all 48 teams with 7 stickers per pack instead of 5.
